<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux x86_64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/28.2.5 Chrome/138.0.7204.251 Electron/37.6.1 Safari/537.36" version="28.2.5" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram id="page1" name="Page 1 — Public Access & Authentication"> <mxGraphModel dx="706" dy="632" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="750" pageHeight="800" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="10" value="SumbiTheses System" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=14;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontColor=#333333;spacingTop=5;align=center;arcSize=5;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="170" y="70" width="430" height="670" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="20" value="Public Access" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;fillColor=#FFF3E0;strokeColor=#E65100;dashed=1;dashPattern=8 8;fontColor=#333333;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="190" y="120" width="380" height="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="101" value="UC01: View Public Projects" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFF3E0;strokeColor=#E65100;fontSize=11;fontColor=#333333;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="220" y="150" width="290" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="102" value="UC02: Download Public Attachments" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFF3E0;strokeColor=#E65100;fontSize=11;fontColor=#333333;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="220" y="210" width="290" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="21" value="Authentication" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#666666;dashed=1;dashPattern=8 8;fontColor=#333333;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="190" y="290" width="390" height="420" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="103" value="UC03: Login (Local)" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=11;fontColor=#333333;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="220" y="320" width="290" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="104" value="UC04: Login (Microsoft OAuth)" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=11;fontColor=#333333;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="220" y="380" width="290" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="105" value="UC05: Register" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=11;fontColor=#333333;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="220" y="440" width="290" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="106" value="UC06: Setup Password (Invitation)" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=11;fontColor=#333333;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="220" y="500" width="290" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="107" value="UC07: Link Microsoft Account" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=11;fontColor=#333333;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="220" y="560" width="290" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="108" value="UC08: Set Password (MS-only)" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=11;fontColor=#333333;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="220" y="620" width="290" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="200" value="Guest" style="shape=umlActor;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;html=1;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#333333;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#95a5a6;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="20" y="360" width="40" height="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="201" value="Student" style="shape=umlActor;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;html=1;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#333333;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#2ecc71;opacity=50;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="680" y="560" width="40" height="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="300" value="" style="edgeStyle=none;html=1;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#95a5a6;" parent="1" source="200" target="101" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="301" value="" style="edgeStyle=none;html=1;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#95a5a6;" parent="1" source="200" target="102" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="302" value="" style="edgeStyle=none;html=1;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#95a5a6;" parent="1" source="200" target="103" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="303" value="" style="edgeStyle=none;html=1;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#95a5a6;" parent="1" source="200" target="104" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="304" value="" style="edgeStyle=none;html=1;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#95a5a6;" parent="1" source="200" target="105" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="305" value="" style="edgeStyle=none;html=1;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#95a5a6;" parent="1" source="200" target="106" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="306" value="" style="edgeStyle=none;html=1;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#2ecc71;" parent="1" source="201" target="107" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="307" value="" style="edgeStyle=none;html=1;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#2ecc71;" parent="1" source="201" target="108" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="500" value="<i>&lt;&lt;extend&gt;&gt;</i>
link existing account" style="endArrow=open;endFill=0;html=1;dashed=1;dashPattern=8 8;fontSize=10;strokeColor=#666666;fontColor=#555555;" parent="1" source="104" target="107" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="550" y="405" /> <mxPoint x="550" y="585" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
